vocab.meaning: nhìn chăm chú ra xa (một cách say mê hoặc trầm tư)
vocab.example: I spent hours simply gazing out at the emerald waters of the bay from the cliff's edge.

vocab.meaning: gợi nhớ lại/đưa ai đó trở về ký ức nào đó
vocab.example: Whenever I look at the photos, that stunning mountain view takes me back to the feeling of absolute freedom I had.
We were lost in the highlands when we stumbled upon a hidden waterfall with the most incredible view I've ever seen.
The way the sunrise lit up the snow-capped peaks was a sight that I’ll cherish forever.

vocab.meaning: vượt lên cao hẳn/sừng sững phía trên
vocab.example: The skyscrapers in Manhattan towered over us, creating a breathtaking urban landscape at dusk.

vocab.meaning: mờ dần/tan biến vào không trung
vocab.example: Watching the city lights fade away into the morning mist from the hilltop was a deeply serene experience.

vocab.meaning: nhìn xuống từ một vị trí rất cao
vocab.example: Standing on the observation deck, you can look down on the clouds, which is a truly surreal perspective.

vocab.meaning: bùng lên (thường nói về màu sắc hoặc ánh sáng)
vocab.example: The sky suddenly burst into shades of violet and orange as the sun dipped below the horizon.

vocab.meaning: ngăn chặn/che khuất (ánh sáng hoặc tầm nhìn)
vocab.example: The dense canopy of the rainforest occasionally shut out the sky, making the brief glimpses of the valley even more precious.

vocab.meaning: chiêm ngưỡng với sự kinh ngạc và ngưỡng mộ
vocab.example: It was impossible not to marvel at the sheer scale of the desert dunes stretching into the distance.
